name: Scaling Point-in-Time Language Models

description: arXiv:2607.11889v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models trained on unrestricted internet corpora inevitably embed information from the future, introducing lookahead bias that compromises the validity of backtests and causal inference in finance and the social sciences. Point-in-time language models--trained exclusively on text available up to each calendar date--eliminat...
author: Bryan Kelly, Semyon Malamud, Johannes Schwab, Teng Andrea Xu
